name: csi-nora
description: CSI Nora — Singtel Enterprise Portfolio Advisor (deployment bundle)

scripts.build: node -e "const fs=require('fs'); if(!fs.existsSync('dist/csi-nora/browser/index.html')){console.error('Missing dist/csi-nora/browser — rebuild from full source repo.'); process.exit(1)} console.log('Using pre-built dist/csi-nora/browser')"
scripts.test:uat: node --test src/app/services/deployment-environment.service.spec.ts 2>/dev/null || echo 'UAT spec requires Angular test runner (ng test) from full source repo'
